feature_build: loop runtime, positioning, and generative adapter

source_provenance.claim: specflow run writes a durable run contract and ledger
source_provenance.verification: tests/contracts/loop-run-contract.test.js creates a temporary run and re-reads run-contract.yaml plus ledger.jsonl

source_provenance.claim: generative stages stop safely by default
source_provenance.verification: CLI smoke test returned agent_action_required and ledger stop_reason agent_action_required

source_provenance.claim: adapter output cannot self-approve a gate
source_provenance.verification: fake provider success returns gate_rerun_required and records owning_gate_command

source_provenance.claim: forbidden human-gate actions block state advance
source_provenance.verification: fake provider output containing git push returns blocked_human_required

source_provenance.claim: Claude and Codex adapter command shapes are grounded in local CLI help
source_provenance.verification: provider builder tests assert claude -p and codex exec JSON command construction

checks: node bin/specflow.js run spec-build --slug smoke --goal 'ready tickets' --input docs/idea.md --contract <tmp>/run-contract.yaml --ledger <tmp>/ledger.jsonl
notes: No live Claude or Codex model call was used in tests. Adapter coverage uses fake provider fixtures by default.
